panels.description: Wide shot, Victor sitting at a cluttered, dimly lit mahogany desk in Geneva. He is looking at his hands with a conflicted expression, heavy shadows on his face, books and papers scattered everywhere.

bubbles.text: The prospect of such an occupation... I cannot collect the courage to recommence my work. I fear the fiend's vengeance.

panels.description: Wide shot, Victor alone in a small wooden boat on a serene blue lake. Bright, warm sunlight contrasts with his lonely posture. He is looking into the distance with a hollow but peaceful expression.

bubbles.text: In solitude, on the rippling waves, I find a brief restoration of my heart.

panels.description: Medium shot, Father sitting in a comfortable armchair, looking warmly and intensely at Victor. The room is cozy, illuminated by warm lamp light.

bubbles.text: My dear son, I have always looked forward to your marriage with our dear Elizabeth.

panels.description: Close up on Father's concerned face, looking over his spectacles at Victor, questioning look.

bubbles.text: You may have met another. This struggle... it causes you misery, does it not?

panels.description: Medium close up, Victor looking up at his father, his expression softening with genuine sincerity and a trace of relief. Warm room lighting.

bubbles.text: I love my cousin tenderly. My future hopes are entirely bound up in the expectation of our union.
